description: mdapi Renovate — Lane-B image bumps ONLY. Lane-A floating apps stay on Keel. See operator ~/imagepolicy-study/PROPOSAL.md.

packageRules.description: Default OFF — do not touch Lane-A floating image refs (Keel owns them).
Lane-B custom mdapi images — X.Y.Z-mdapi.N versioning (CI mints these). Reviewed by default; minor/major upstream bumps need a human.
Lane-B custom mdapi images — auto-merge the contextless -mdapi.N rebuilds (classified as patch) + digests after CI green. 1-day soak guards against a torn push being auto-deployed.
Lane-B upstream critical: zot. Manual review with release notes + 3-day soak.
Lane-B upstream critical: Technitium DNS. Manual review with release notes + 3-day soak.

hostRules.description: Read private mdapi registry tags. Credentials injected at runtime via RENOVATE_HOST_RULES (NOT committed).
